name: Sophea Meas
story: Sophea learned to weave on her grandmother's loom at the age of seven. Today she runs a cooperative of 20 women weavers who preserve ancient ikat patterns.

name: Rithy Chann
story: Rithy is one of the last master silversmiths trained in the royal court tradition. His pieces are collected internationally.

name: Borey Sok
story: Living in the shadow of Angkor Wat, Borey draws inspiration from temple carvings to create contemporary wooden art.

name: Dara Keo
story: Dara sources ingredients directly from small-scale farmers and packages them into beautiful gift sets that promote Cambodian cuisine worldwide.
